name: Vidente Co., Ltd.
summary: Vidente Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells high-performance HD video equipment for the digital broadcasting and professional video markets in South Korea and internationally. Its products include field, 2K/HD, 4K/UHD, studio wall, and rack monitors; backup devices comprising photo storage and video storage; and colorimeter equipment, and color LUT products. Vidente Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
